title: Bloody Spears
description: This texture pack makes all spears bloody! Adding a little more detail to some roleplays, or just a cool texture pack! can pair well with the bloody mace!
body: This texture pack makes the spear bloody! this includes all type of spears! Can fit well in roleplay videos or just a general cool texture pack! Could pair well with the Bloody mace texture pack! hope yall enjoy this texture pack :3
